---
title: "Day 0: R Foundation"
---

## Goal

Day 0 prepares the minimal R foundation needed before starting Seurat.

## Students should be able to

- Open RStudio.
- Run an R script.
- Install and load packages.
- Understand vectors, data frames, lists, and matrices.
- Read a CSV/TSV file.
- Make a simple plot.
- Understand project folders and working directory.

## Why R before Seurat?

Seurat is an R package. If students do not understand basic R objects, they may run commands without understanding what is stored in the analysis object.
